positive: A mystical forest silhouette, featuring a majestic wise owl perched on a crescent moonlit branch. The owl has large, intricate feathers and striking golden eyes. Surrounding elements include stylized glowing mushrooms, gentle swirling mist, and winding vines. The overall composition should be highly detailed, graphic, and centered, with deep indigo and teal color gradients contrasted against a creamy off-white background. Suitable for a clean apparel print, achieving a strong, moody, yet positive aesthetic. Mid-century modern vector art style meets bioluminescent fantasy illustration, with thick, clean lines and flat areas of solid color for high contrast. High resolution, minimalist composition, perfect for T-shirt graphic.
negative: low detail, fuzzy, blurry, grain, watermark, logo, text, noise, ugly, extra limbs, bad anatomy, artifacts, messy, disfigured
